theme.description: Minimal, Professional, Technical, Focused, Enterprise Ready mobile-first web app.

rules.headings: Tight tracking (tracking-tight), never exceed text-4xl. Use font-medium to font-semibold.
rules.answers: Large and highly readable (text-2xl to text-3xl font-medium tracking-tight).

spacing_and_layout.container: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen relative overflow-x-hidden bg-[#0A0A0A] text-[#F8F8F8]
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. p-6 to p-8 for standard containers. Elements need breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align for text and data, center-align for major isolated actions.
spacing_and_layout.navigation: No complex navigation, no sidebar, no chat windows. Bottom action area for thumb-friendly one-handed usage.

surfaces_and_borders.cards: bg-[#181818] with 1px solid border-[#27272A]. Max border-radius: rounded-2xl.

motion.rules: transition-opacity duration-300 ease-out, transition-transform duration-300 ease-out. Absolutely NO physics-based spring animations.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2563EB] text-[#F8F8F8] h-14 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-medium w-full active:opacity-80 transition-opacity
buttons.secondary: bg-[#111111] border border-[#27272A] text-[#F8F8F8] h-14 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center font-medium w-full active:opacity-80 transition-opacity
buttons.icon_button: h-14 w-14 rounded-full bg-[#181818] border border-[#27272A] flex items-center justify-center text-[#F8F8F8] active:opacity-80 transition-opacity

camera_overlay.container: absolute inset-0 z-10 pointer-events-none flex flex-col
camera_overlay.viewfinder: flex-1 border-2 border-[#2563EB]/50 m-8 rounded-xl relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:shadow-[0_0_0_9999px_rgba(0,0,0,0.6)]

home_screen.layout: flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-screen p-8 text-center

elements.name: Tagline
elements.style: text-lg text-[#A1A1AA] max-w-[250px] mx-auto leading-snug mb-16

camera_screen.layout: fixed inset-0 bg-black flex flex-col max-w-md mx-auto

elements.name: Overlay
elements.style: Screen detection viewfinder as defined in components

elements.name: Controls
elements.style: absolute bottom-0 w-full p-8 pb-12 flex justify-between items-end z-20 pointer-events-auto

results_screen.layout: fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-end justify-center pointer-events-none max-w-md mx-auto

elements.name: Sheet
elements.style: w-full bg-[#181818] rounded-t-3xl border-t border-[#27272A] p-6 pb-10 pointer-events-auto transform translate-y-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-out

icons.rules: Use minimal, outline icons. Size 24px usually. Color matching text rules.

media.rules: Do not use placeholder images or illustrations. The app relies entirely on geometric structures, camera feed, and typography.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='capture-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Text over backgrounds meets APCA standards. Focus states must use ring-2 ring-[#2563EB] ring-offset-2 ring-offset-[#0A0A0A].

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the JSON color variables using custom hex codes. Do not use generic tailwind grays.
Apply 'dark' class universally; this app is dark-mode only.
Implement the mobile layout wrapper strictly: max-w-md mx-auto. It must look and behave like a phone screen even on desktop viewports.
No horizontal scrolling allowed. Ensure overflow-x-hidden on the main container.
Camera must handle live preview seamlessly using HTML5 video/navigator.mediaDevices.
Use standard .js files for React components, not .tsx.
Shadcn components or custom Framer Motion divs used for bottom sheet must strictly use linear or ease-out transitions for slide-up. NO spring or bounce animations.
Result answers must automatically scroll into view when they appear.
